summary: Solid TypeScript practices (explicit types, proper async/await, specific error handling). Workflow uses pinned action refs (checkout@v4, setup-bun@v2) and least-privilege permissions. However: (1) workflow references fixtures/ directory in final step but no sample test result files are shown in deliverable—critical gap since task explicitly requires 'Create sample test result files as fixtures'; (2) package.json not provided despite bun install being called; (3) workflow doesn't validate itself with actionlint, though optional. Code modularity is excellent (types.ts, aggregator.ts, parsers/ separation). XML parser's isArray config (junit.ts:8) lacks comment explaining why it forces consistent array handling. run.ts error handling is good but assumes UTF-8 encoding without option.
